name: Kite
description: A sky of paper kites warping in the wind, tails streaming behind — every redraw bends each diamond and tips it to a new angle.

code.style: --sail: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4)); --tilt: @rand(-24deg, 24deg); --rule: ( /* spine and crossbar positions are emitted once and shared by the sail outline and the tail */ --kx: @r(38, 62); --ky: @r(22, 44); @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 6%; background: var(--sail); clip-path: polygon(calc(@var(--kx) * 1%) 0%, @rand(72%, 100%) calc(@var(--ky) * 1%), calc(@var(--kx) * 1%) @rand(78%, 100%), @rand(0%, 28%) calc(@var(--ky) * 1%)); transform: rotate(var(--tilt)); transition: ease 600ms; } :after { content: ''; position: absolute; @size: 6%; left: calc(@var(--kx) * 1% - 3%); top: 88%; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--color5); box-shadow: calc(-40px / @Y) calc(30px / @Y) 0 var(--color5); transition: ease 600ms; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
